brand_focus: stillness press catalog angle via generalized doctrine

gtm_identity.emotional_job: stillness press catalog angle: meet it through painting without naming the teacher
gtm_identity.functional_job: Generalized doctrine practice aligned to stillness press
gtm_identity.discovery_hook: The alarm is lying — your body can learn a quieter signal.
gtm_identity.doctrine_lead:
When I teach calligraphy, I ask my students to look at the full scroll before they
look at any single character. The eye wants to go immediately to the detail —

bridge_phrases: too tired to try even small things
why can't i just be normal and chill
setting a boundary feels selfish and mean

cover_art_identity.note: Brand-driven cover system keys off brand_id the same as the 40 archetypes.

mission: Offer grounded doctrine in generalized attribution, angled through the stillness press archetype.
